project.title: TTA-TC: Test-Time Adaptation for Temporally Robust Encrypted Traffic Classification
project.titleZh: TTA-TC：面向时间鲁棒加密流量分类的测试时自适应
project.targetVenue: Top-tier network security venues (NDSS, CCS, USENIX Security)
project.researchQuestion: Can test-time adaptation with traffic-specific self-supervised auxiliary tasks mitigate the rapid temporal performance degradation of encrypted traffic classifiers without any labeled data?
project.methodApproach: Test-Time Adaptation (TTA) with traffic-specific self-supervised auxiliary tasks (Masked Packet Feature Prediction, Packet Order Prediction, Flow Statistics Reconstruction). Class-aware selective adaptation triggered by per-class drift detection. Anti-forgetting mechanisms (Fisher regularization, stochastic restoration, PBRS buffering).

primary.name: CESNET-QUIC22
primary.description: 153M QUIC flows, 102 classes, 4 weeks, from CESNET backbone
